  1. com.equipmentrental.equipment_rental_system.exception

Uses of Package
com.equipmentrental.equipment_rental_system.exception

Packages that use com.equipmentrental.equipment_rental_system.exception
Package
Description
com.equipmentrental.equipment_rental_system.controller
 
  • Classes in com.equipmentrental.equipment_rental_system.exception used by com.equipmentrental.equipment_rental_system.controller
    Class
    Description
    BookingConflictException
    Thrown when a new booking conflicts with an existing confirmed booking for the same equipment item (BR-02).
    DeletionBlockedException
    Thrown when an entity cannot be deleted because it has dependent records.
    EquipmentNotAvailableException
    Thrown when a booking is attempted on equipment that is not available (BR-01).
    InvalidBookingDatesException
    Thrown when a booking is submitted with an invalid date range (BR-05).
    ResourceNotFoundException
    Thrown when a requested entity cannot be found by its ID.
